name: Premium Almonds
description: High-quality, crunchy almonds sourced from California. Rich in nutrients and perfect for wholesale buyers.

name: Organic Cashew Nuts
description: Whole, creamy cashews perfect for snacking and culinary use. Grade A quality available in bulk.

name: Cardamom Pods
description: Fragrant green cardamom pods. Sourced directly from farms to ensure maximum freshness and aroma.

name: Saffron (Grade A)
description: Pure, premium quality saffron threads. Known for its rich color and intense flavor profile.

name: Walnuts (Kashmiri)
description: Shell-less walnut halves. High omega-3 content and premium taste from the valleys of Kashmir.

name: Black Pepper
description: Bold and pungent black peppercorns. Essential spice for all cuisines, available in various grades.
